creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Michael from comment #0)

> … the problem at this point, at least for me, verbose_boot does not help 
> and failing at mounting root there are no other options as typing a 
> valid boot device …

Briefly: 

1. boot from installation media
2. opt for a shell, not the installer
3. create a directory to be used as a temporary root
4. import with option -R
5. edit the loader.conf, revert to integral OpenZFS …

<https://openzfs.github.io/openzfs-docs/man/8/zpool-import.8.html#R>
